name: Dryvebox Charleston
about: Dryvebox Charleston is a mobile golf simulator venue that brings state-of-the-art, climate-controlled golf studios powered by Tour-trusted TrackMan technology directly to events, parties, and locations throughout the Charleston, SC area. The service specializes in providing an interactive, high-tech golf entertainment experience for various occasions, including corporate gatherings, private celebrations, and brand activations. Their offerings include a variety of form factors such as patented mobile simulator trailers and indoor pop-up enclosures, fully equipped with golf clubs, balls, and professional staff to manage setup and operation. The venue is designed to provide a complete golf experience for both beginners and experienced players, focusing on accessibility and fun at any event location.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient mobile service that brings professional golf simulation directly to your event location
Tour-trusted TrackMan technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Variety of form factors including trailers and indoor pop-ups to fit any space

food_and_drink.notes: On-site setup can accommodate event catering; BYOB policies are not explicitly mentioned
On-site setup can include beverages; specific alcohol policies are not detailed

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-trusted technology used across all mobile simulator configurations

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, all clubs, balls, and equipment are provided with your rental. The venue offers a full set of golf clubs for use during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: On-site setups can accommodate food and beverages for events. While BYOB policies are not explicitly mentioned, the service appears flexible for catering and drinks at private parties.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies by group size and skill level, but a typical session lasts 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and activities planned.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Dryvebox is kid-friendly. The service has been used for children's birthday parties and accommodates both beginners and young golfers with appropriate games and activities.
